title: podocarpus guatemalensis subsp. allenii
intro: Podocarpus guatemalensis subsp. allenii, also known as Allen's podocarpus, is a plant species belonging to the family Podocarpaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Allen's podocarpus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
